mnemonics: MAPS: Machine Alignment for Public Safety
STEP UP: Systematically Evaluating Policies for Unintended Consequences
keyPoints: Incorporate human-centered design principles to develop AI systems that prioritize user needs and well-being.
Conduct thorough impact assessments to identify potential risks and consequences of AI system deployment.
Establish transparent and accountable decision-making processes to ensure fairness and equity in AI-driven policy decisions.
